## Summary

What documentation/content was updated?

## Type

- [ ] README / onboarding
- [ ] Contributor workflow
- [ ] Design / architecture specs
- [ ] Content authoring docs
- [ ] Other docs cleanup

## Accuracy Check

- [ ] Verified commands against `package.json` and scripts
- [ ] Verified file paths and references exist
- [ ] Verified terminology aligns with current docs and code

## Validation

- [ ] No runtime changes
- [ ] Ran relevant checks (optional):
  - [ ] `npm test -- --run`
  - [ ] `npm run build`

## Follow-ups

Any remaining docs debt or intentional deferrals.
